description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image, caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository, and defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables. Define a single stage named test and a job called deploy:jdk8 that runs only on the master branch. In the test stage the deploy:jdk8 job should execute "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test jacoco:report" followed by an awk command that reads target/site/jacoco/jacoco.csv and prints coverage statistics, and it should store the target/staging directory as an artifact.
